All Services Performed By A General Dentist

Downtown Dentist in Edmonton

Our Dentists in Edmonton are always accepting new patients at Uptown Dental Centre.  We are a full-service family dental practice located in downtown Edmonton. We offer a complete list of general, restorative and cosmetic dental services, including cleanings and exams, crowns and bridges, tooth whitening, and sedation dentistry. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to providing quality oral health care that’s personalize to your needs in a relaxed and friendly environment.  Book your next appointment with our dentists in Edmonton today!

UDC Mission.

Provide Quality Oral Care, On-Time Every Time.

Friendly and Professional Team

We have 5 general dentists, 3 hygienists, 5 dental assistants, and 3 administrative team members dedicated to serving you.

More About Us

On-Time Appointments So You Can Visit Your Dentist & Be On Your Way!

We provide quality oral health care that’s personalized to your needs, in a professional, friendly and relaxed atmosphere.

Free Invisalign® Consultations at Uptown Dental Care

Straighten your teeth with Invisalign® clear aligners. Book your Free Consultation at Uptown Dental Centre Today!

Our Dental Team

We Offer A Full Range Of Dental Services At UDC

  • From Dental Check-Ups & Cleanings to Invisalign® & Extractions
  • On-Time Dental Appointments
  • Located on First Floor of First Edmonton Place
  • Convenient Parking & Wheelchair Accessible
  • Direct Billing to Most Insurance Providers
  • We Follow the AB Dental Fee Guide

Visit us at Suite 106, 10665 Jasper Avenue, Edmonton, AB T5J 3S9, Canada or call 780-424-8666. We’re open Monday to Thursday from 8:00 am to 4:30 pm, and on Friday from 8:00 am to 4:00 pm.

Staying informed with the latest dental news or learning new tips & tricks to assist in maintaining your oral hygiene is important for an individual.  We try to provide relative and informative information for our patients with our blog, however if you have a particular topic you would like to learn more about, ask us and we will try to post a blog for you!

See Our Blog

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I find a dentist in my area?

When searching for a dentist in Edmonton, look for a clinic that offers comprehensive dental care, modern technology, flexible scheduling, and positive patient reviews. Choosing an experienced dental clinic in Edmonton that focuses on patient comfort and preventive care can help support your long-term oral health.

What dental services do you provide?

At Uptown Dental Centre, we provide family and general dentistry services, including dental exams, cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, root canal therapy, cosmetic dentistry, Invisalign, dental implants, and emergency dental care in Edmonton.

Are new patients welcome?

Yes! Our dental clinic in Edmonton welcomes new patients of all ages. Whether you need routine dental care or a new dentist near you, our team is here to help you feel comfortable during every visit.

Can I get same-day help for a dental emergency?

Yes, we offer emergency dental care for toothaches, broken teeth, infections, lost fillings, and other urgent dental concerns. Contact our dentist in Edmonton for prompt treatment and pain relief.

How do I book a dental appointment?

Booking an appointment is simple. Call our clinic or request an appointment online through Uptown Dental Centre. Our dental team will confirm your visit and answer any questions about your dental care.

Do you accept dental insurance?

Yes, our dental clinic in Edmonton accepts most insurance plans & offers direct billing whenever possible. We help patients understand their coverage and make dental care more convenient and affordable.

See What Our Patients Are Saying

Your satisfaction and comfort are the true measures of the dedicated dental care we provide every single day. Read through our latest patient reviews to see how our team consistently delivers a friendly and reliable experience.
